evidence_span: We posit that the most effective form of reasoning is one that deliberates directly in the action space.; Action Chain-of-Thought (ACoT): Together, EAR and IAR co-form an Action Chain-of-Thought
reason: The README explicitly aligns the repository with the paper’s action-space reasoning terminology and names IAR as part of ACoT, providing direct repository-level evidence that Implicit Action Reasoner is a first-class concept in this codebase’s documented architecture.
Gemma attention explicitly accepts kv_cache in the main model stack, confirming cached attention-state support beyond the fast variant.
